name: PARKES WEBER SYNDROME
definition: KLIPPEL-TRÉNAUNAY-WEBER SYNDROME characterized by cutaneous capillary malformation and limb overgrowth in combination with
dominant_finding: arteriovenous fistula-like stains in periarticular region
discriminating_features: hemihypertrophy = outgrowth of soft tissues + overgrowth of bone in affected limb
arteriovenous fistula-like stains in periarticular region

general: hemihypertrophy = outgrowth of soft tissues + overgrowth of bone in affected limb
arteriovenous fistula-like stains in periarticular region
